name: control-tower
description: A Geist-styled dark web dashboard over workflow-lens: run/replay Claude Code workflows live, stream telemetry, trip the budget governor, apply cost optimizations, and distill durable learnings.

scripts.smoke: PORT=48787 node server.mjs & sleep 1; curl -fsS http://localhost:48787/v1/health > /dev/null && echo OK; kill %1
